evals.prompt: 当前 PR 的 CI 挂了，帮我看看是什么问题
evals.expected_output: Run inspect_pr_checks.py and summarize each failing check with its name, the smallest useful log snippet, and a suggested local reproduction command.
assertions: Runs inspect_pr_checks.py to collect failing checks
Summarizes failing check name + minimal log snippet + local repro command

evals.prompt: PR #88 的 Buildkite check 挂了，帮我修
evals.expected_output: Recognize Buildkite as an external (non-GitHub-Actions) provider, report the URL, and mark it out of scope unless the user explicitly insists.
assertions: Identifies Buildkite as an external provider
Reports the run URL and marks it out of scope
Does not fabricate GitHub Actions logs for it

evals.prompt: CI 失败了，直接帮我修掉然后验证
evals.expected_output: Diagnose, propose and apply the fix, run the local reproduction command to verify, then re-check gh pr checks.
assertions: Goes beyond diagnosis to implement the fix
Runs the local repro command to verify the fix
Re-runs gh pr checks to confirm

evals.prompt: 帮我总结一下这个 PR 上 reviewer 提的修改意见
evals.expected_output: Near-neighbor negative: a review-comment triage request should route to gh-address-comments, not gh-fix-ci.

evals.prompt: 帮我把暂存的改动提交了
evals.expected_output: Near-neighbor negative: a commit-authoring request should route to git-commit, not gh-fix-ci.
